    TOYS, with or without accessories, being ANY of the following:
   (a)  electrically or mechanically operated;
   (b)  steering wheels;
   (c)  motor vehicles or craft, as follows:
          (i) cars, trucks or other wheeled or tracked toys;
         (ii) sleds or sleighs;
        (iii) air or space;
         (iv) ice, snow or water;
          (v) carriages, trailers or other wheeled toys,
        but NOT including ANY of the following:
          (i) wooden pull or push along carts;
         (ii) vehicles made from wooden blocks, with wooden or
              plastic wheels;
        (iii) wooden trains with wooden or plastic wheels;
         (iv) plastic dump trucks;
          (v) plastic vehicles OTHER THAN those with moveable
              road wheels or steering wheels;
         (vi) vehicles made from non-toxic plastic foam;
        (vii) planes OTHER THAN those with moveable wheels or
              flaps;
       (viii) yachts or plastic boats OTHER THAN those with
              moveable steering wheels or rudders;
   (d)  household appliances, but NOT including those made from wood;
   (e)  inflatable, but NOT including:
          (i) bouncing ride on type;
         (ii) balloons;
        (iii) balls;
   (f)  balls, but NOT including inflatable or foam balls;
   (g)  jack in box;
   (h)  doll"s houses or furniture, but NOT including those made
        of wood;
   (i)  wallets, purses or handbags;
   (j)  clothing accessories, being wands, laces, buttons or
        umbrellas;
   (k)  garages;
   (l)  road or railway track, but NOT including road or traffic
        signs of wood;
   (m)  household furniture, but NOT including desks, tables or
        chairs of wood;
   (n)  buildings, gardens or farms, but NOT including ANY of the
        following:
          (i) wooden playhouses or cubby houses;
         (ii) wooden petrol stations or parking stations;
        (iii) wooden garages;
   (o)  drawing boards, erasable;
   (p)  building, educational or puzzle, but NOT including clip
        together shapes;
   (q)  video recorders, cameras, projectors or viewfinders;
   (r)  reel cards;
   (s)  cot, including teethers, crib exercisers, rattles,
        jingles or mirrors;
   (t)  knitting, art, craft, educational or activity;
   (u)  puzzles or games of skill;
   (v)  combat, including guns, swords or armaments;
   (w)  sporting, but NOT including ANY of the following:
          (i) inflatable balls;
         (ii) hoops;
        (iii) skipping ropes;
         (iv) kites;
          (v) toxic foam balls;
   (x)  binoculars or telescopes;
   (y)  tools, but NOT including plastic rakes or plastic spades;
   (z)  food, with or without basket or container;
   (aa) bags or boxes, travel, jewellery or cosmetic;
   (ab) key rings;
   (ac) throwing or projectile, but NOT including inflatable or toxic
        foam balls;
   (ad) squeeze;
   (ae) spinning;
   (af) castles, including those having magic themes, with or without
        representations of human or non human forms;
   (ag) hair appliances and refills;
   (ah) activity mirrors;
   (ai) drawing or tracing, with or without stencils;
   (aj) puppets;
   (ak) balls with animal head shapes, non-inflatable;
   (al) light or sound emitting;
   (am) communication;
   (an) playground floor mats;
   (ao) magnetic shapes;
   (ap) globes;
   (aq) beach, but NOT including buckets and spades;
   (ar) yo yos;
   (as) headgear, masks, glasses or noses;
   (at) ride on, but NOT including inflatable type;
   (au) cash registers, play money or money boxes;
   (av) glow;
   (aw) horror;
   (ax) tattoos;
   (ay) scientific instruments;
   (az) moulds;
   (ba) stickers or cut outs;
   (bb) stamps;
   (bc) peg boards;
   (bd) adventure;
   (be) pencil toppers;
   (bf) zipper pulls;
   (bg) magic;
   (bh) water tanks or underwater creatures;
   (bi) ghost figures whether or not including coffins, TV"s,
        treasure chests, toilets or vacuum cleaners;
   (bj) imitation human parts;
   (bk) garden tools, but NOT including plastic rakes or plastic
        spades;
   (bl) learning to drive;
   (bm) watches or clocks;
   (bn) sunglasses;
   (bo) badges;
   (bp) shapes or sequins;
   (bq) glitter;
   (br) household utensils;
   (bs) marbles;
   (bt) stuffed or plush;
   (bu) activity, non-wooden, with moveable parts;
   (bv) bath toys, but NOT including plastic boats or planes,
        OTHER THAN those with moveable parts
   (bw) rattles;
   (bx) water pistols or guns;
   (by) kaleidoscopes;
   (bz) machinery being of lifting, elevating, materials processing,
        materials handling machinery, not being wheeled or tracked
        vehicles;
   (ca) counting frames;
   (cb) playground equipment;
   (cc) jewellery

    PARTS, TABLE OR BOARD GAMES, being ANY of the following:
   (a) game playing pieces being made of ANY of the following:
           (i) pewter;
          (ii) pewter plated with gold OR silver;
         (iii) brass;
          (iv) brass plated with gold OR silver;
           (v) bronze;
          (vi) bronze plated with gold OR silver;
         (vii) silver;
        (viii) silver plated with gold;
          (ix) silver platd with gold and engraved with guilloche
               enamelling;
           (x) wood;
          (xi) tesori;
         (xii) gemstones;
        (xiii) gold;
         (xiv) crystal;
   (b) custom minted coins of solid brass;
   (c) game boards made of ANY of the following:
          (i) wood;
         (ii) wood with tesori;
        (iii) wood with tempered glass surface;
         (iv) wood with tempered glass surface and tesori;
          (v) aluminium;
         (vi) aluminium and glass;
        (vii) aluminium and plexiglass;
       (viii) glass;
         (ix) tesori;
   (d) tumbler with die cast door and wire cage of brass embellished
       with gold, with a porcelain base and handle;
   (e) bankers tally board of polished hardwood with layered gold
       feet;
   (f) walnut and brass scorekeeping board;
   (g) solid sterling silver OR solid sterling silver plated with
       gold, scoring pegs;
   (h) wooden tile racks with gold plated end caps;
   (i) dice OR dice cups;
   (j) polished hardwood balls with gold letters and numbers

          (i) buildings OR structures;

        (iii) books;
         (iv) furniture;

         (vi) musical instruments;
        (vii) household utensils;
       (viii) suns, moons, planets OR stars;
         (ix) apparel, footwear OR ties;
          (x) confectionery;
         (xi) boxes;
        (xii) umbrellas;
       (xiii) plants, fruit AND vegetables;
        (xiv) Christmas stockings;
         (xv) candles;

       scenes OR items in a liquid AND having imitation snow OR
       glitter;

   (f) wall and hanging plaques;

   (f) electrical controls;
   (g) pendulums;
   (h) platforms;
   (i) ring frames;
   (j) gondola, seating;
   (k) support angles;
   (l) cleats;
   (m) plates;
   (n) brackets;
   (o) weldments
    		01/01/202207/12/2021
    9508.29.0021505491 
    COMPONENTS, INTERACTIVE ADVENTURE PLAYGROUND, being ANY of the 
following:
  (a) support towers;
  (b) tunnels and/or tubes; 
  (c) web and/or rope panels;
  (d) web and/or rope climbs;
  (e) web and/or rope platforms;
  (f) web and or rope tubes;
  (g) web and/or rope bridges; 
  (h) themed decorations representing ANY of the following:
        (i) buoys;
       (ii) broken rowboats;
      (iii) ships bows and panels;
       (iv) captains wheels;
        (v) life rings; 
       (vi) sharks,
  (i) suspended ride on balls and shapes;
  (j) upholstered shapes and panels;
  (k) flying foxes;
  (l) slides and slide sections; 
  (m) supports and/or framework and/or decking;
  (n) walls and panels;
  (o) roof liners and/or rooftops;
  (p) canopies and/or frames;
  (q) bubble panels;
  (r) railings; 
  (s) platforms and/or launch pads; 
  (t) lookouts
    		01/01/202207/12/2021
    9508.29.0021505485 
    SLOPES OR SLIDES, SKI, artificial, with OR without inflatable 
snow tubes

    9508.29.0021505480

  (a) plastic track surface; 
  (b) electric karts; 
  (c) track barriers

    The Australian Border Force acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of Country throughout Australia and their continuing connection to land, sea and community. We pay our respects to all Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples, their cultures and to their elders past, present and emerging.​
